packet.caveat: Profile-blind verbal-analytical packet for the conceptual REI simulator; it contains no character authority or hidden Emocio/Instinkt motive.
constraints: A decision must be made within three minutes.
Only the three public options may be used.
explicit_facts: Process temperature rose by 11 C during the last six minutes.
A backup sensor reads 8 C below the primary sensor; which reading is correct is unknown.
Further heating can damage equipment, while a controlled shutdown causes financial loss.
The structured scene shows a rising temperature gauge, an amber warning light, and intact process equipment.

explicit_options.description: Plan and execute the controlled shutdown procedure immediately.
explicit_options.label: Immediate controlled shutdown

explicit_options.description: Verify both sensors for no more than three minutes and then decide again.
explicit_options.label: Brief verification

explicit_options.description: Proceed with production at the current settings.
explicit_options.label: Continue production

explicit_unknowns: Which sensor is correct is unknown.
Whether equipment damage has already occurred is unknown.
rules: Retain explicit unknowns and compare consequences without inventing sensor reliability.
